title: Hypixel Skyblock, Optimizations, and Visuals (SOV)
description: A collection of some skyblock mods along with numerous helpful optimizations and mods to improve the visuals of the game
body:
***Important:*** In the settings for bobby mode enable "Dynamic World Management" (you can find the setting page using the mod menu in game) and set the chunk render distance to whatever you want (recommend 128) and then go to your render distance setting and set it to that
***Do not run /bobby upgrade***

Contact me @ wario_ on discord if you have issues :)

Please show these mod devs some love by hearting their mods and starring and forking their repo's! Donate if you have the means to do so, there's been a lot of work that's gone into each of these mods. 

# What does this modpack include?
**Mods**
- Skyblock
  - Firmament (port of *some* of NEU's features)
  - Skyblock PV (modern version of NEU's pv feature)
  - Skyblocker (general modern skyblock mod with dungeons features)
  - Skyhanni (general skyblock mod)
  - Aarons Mod (m7 features, in depth particle control, zoom utility)
  - Fishing mods
    - Feesh (main fishing mod)
    - Fishy Addons (adds other fishing utilities like clear lava)
    - RFU (adds some more "niche" fishing features and fishing achievments)
- Optimizations
  - Bad Optimizations
  - C2ME (Chunk Loading)
  - Debugify
  - Dynamic FPS (Idle FPS)
  - Fast IP Ping
  - Ferrite Core (fixes memory leaks)
  - GPUBooster (adds some newer rendering capabilities to minecraft. Requires "newer" hardware)
  - Immediately fast (boots faster)
  - Kyrpton (networking improvements)
  - Lithium
  - Particle Core (particle culling)
  - Sodium
  - Sodium Extra
  - Sodium Extra Information
  - Entity Culling
  - More Culling
- Utility
  - Controlling (help with keybindings)
  - Compacting (combines duplicate messages to reduce clutter (like skytils used to))
  - Cubes without boarders (adds boarderless fullscreen)
  - Mod Menu
  - REI (fabric port of JEI)
  - Sound Controller (allows editing of individual sounds)
  - Tooltip Scroll (tolltip scrolling)
- Many Library/Dependancy Mods

**Resource Packs**
- Furfsky
- Fresh Animations (adds animations to mobs)
- Nautilus 3D (makes things 3d)

**Shaders (and other visuals)**
- Bliss shaders
- Bobby (increase render distance past 7)
- Continutity (connected textures)
- Dark Loading Screen
- Dynamic Crosshair (context based crosshair)
- Fadeless (removes fade effects)
- Sounds (adds sounds)
- Skin Mods
  - 3d Skin Layers (makes skins 3d including player heads)
  - Ears (used for adding custom elements to skins in a lightweight, multiplayer compatible way)

# Setup
If you have a pre-existing mod instance you should copy your config folder and options file over unless you want to recongfigure everything.
